title: Virtuoso is always changing the GeoSPARQL geometry type to the Virtuoso specific one when loading data
key_bug_features: GeoSPARQL geometry type changes to Virtuoso specific type
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE locations (id IRI PRIMARY KEY, label STRING, identifier STRING, publisher IRI, image IRI, interactionCount STRING, url IRI);
CREATE TABLE geometry (id IRI PRIMARY KEY, type STRING, lat DOUBLE, long DOUBLE, wktLiteral STRING);

INSERT INTO locations VALUES (<http://data.linkedevents.org/location/028f1b02-d121-46f9-bff7-b5e5509a356c/>, 'Duomo di Milano - Duomo of Milan', '345483388889753', <http://www.facebook.com>, <https://fbcdn-sphotos-d-a.akamaihd.net/hphotos-ak-xpa1/t31.0-8/s720x720/901621_475672112537546_754871748_o.jpg>, '3964 Checkins, 3996 Likes', <http://www.duomomilano.it/it/>);
SELECT * FROM locations l JOIN geometry g ON l.id = g.id WHERE g.lat IS NOT NULL AND g.long IS NOT NULL;
